capability_B2_modular_overlay.claim: environment density trained on other layouts, composed at inference, lowers overlap on the unseen layout

capability_H2_global_routing.claim: coarse-flow likelihood ranks the real detour above a straight line, reversing the per-step density

summary: Both tracks produce comparable route distributions; each adds a capability a single flow lacks -- B: inference-time layer swap, H: global route discrimination. They are complementary (a coarse plan whose fine steps use the product-B environment expert = X2).
